constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form

reference_templates.title: Mixed language attributes
reference_templates.notes: One field has lang=sv with Swedish label among English fields
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Mixed languages

reference_templates.title: Duplicate element IDs
reference_templates.notes: Two inputs share id="email" - tests disambiguation by name or DOM order
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Duplicate element IDs

reference_templates.title: Definition list form
reference_templates.notes: Fields structured as dl/dt/dd definition list pairs
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Definition list

Preferred start

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Reference DOM (Mixed language attributes): One field has lang=sv with Swedish label among English fields Reference DOM (Duplicate element IDs): Two inputs share id="email" - tests disambiguation by name or DOM order Reference DOM (Definition list form): Fields structured as dl/dt/dd definition list pairs Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: native-select-not-combobox, label-wraps-deep, glued-label-text, shadow-host, decoy-form. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Mixed language attributes; Duplicate element IDs; Definition list form.
